thread.title: Rahul hails Priyanka's victory; praises his 'family in Wayanad' for placing trust on her
thread.title_full: Rahul hails Priyanka's victory; praises his 'family in Wayanad' for placing trust on her

author: @english_mathrubhumi
title: Rahul hails Priyanka's victory; praises his 'family in Wayanad' for placing trust on her
text: Rahul Gandhi and Priyanka Gandhi. Photo: PTI Kozhikode: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi expressed pride that 'his family’ in Wayanad had placed its trust on his sister Priyanka while extending his congratulations to her for emerging victorious in the Wayanad by-election, succeeding him. To advertise here, Rahul shared in a post on X that he knows Priyanka will lead Wayanad with courage, compassion and an unwavering sense of dedication to bring progress and prosperity to the region. Get Latest Mathrubhumi Updates in English Following her victory, Priyanka Gandhi has announced she would be visiting Wayanad within two days. Priyanka secured a victory with a majority of 4,10,931 votes, surpassing the majority Rahul Gandhi achieved in the 2019 and 2024 general elections.
